summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Alpha Architect 1-3 Month Box ETF (BOXX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund is actively managed. The fund seeks to provide the price and yield performance of 1-3 month US Treasury Bills, less fees and expenses, through the use of box spreads. BOXX was launched on Dec 28, 2022 and is issued by Alpha Architect.

data.title: BOXX ETF: Cash-Like Returns Without the Tax Bill
data.text: Unboxing the Alpha Architect ETF's approach to a popular option trade. Manager research analyst Lan Tran with Morningstar Research Services breaks down the strategy of the Alpha Architect 1-3 Month Bo...
